ingredients.prep: peeled and cut into big chunks

instructions: Place sweet potatoes in a large Dutch oven filled 3/4-full with water. Bring to a boil and cook for 10 minutes. Add chuck roast and bison to the pot and cook until meat is no longer pink, 10 to 12 minutes.

Add carrots, peas, green beans, and spinach to the pot and cook over medium heat for 15 minutes. Add oats and stir until mixture has thickened, 5 to 7 minutes. Stir in pumpkin and olive oil; remove from heat and let cool a bit, 5 to 10 minutes. Transfer roast to a plate and dice meat; return to mixture.
Use a potato masher to mash up mixture to a mushy consistency. Let mixture cool sufficiently, about 30 minutes. Place into resealable containers and freeze.

dog-liver-bites.name: Dog Liver Bites
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease a 9-inch square baking dish and line it with parchment paper.
Add oats to the bowl of a food processor; pulse until finely chopped, 10 to 15 seconds. Transfer oats to a large bowl and mix in flour.
Place livers in the food processor and process until smooth, 10 to 15 seconds. Add eggs and blend until well combined, about 10 seconds. Add oil and process until incorporated.
Add liver mixture to oat and flour mixture; stir until well blended. Spoon into the prepared baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven until firm to the touch but not hard and crispy, 30 to 40 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely before cutting into 50 pieces.

dog-treats.name: Dog Treats

ingredients.item: (4 oz.) shredded gouda or sharp cheddar
Curly parsley leaves and tender stems

instructions:
IF USING A FOOD PROCESSOR: Pulse 1 cup (113 g) whole wheat flour, ¾ cup (96 g) brown rice flour, ¾ cup (76 g) old-fashioned rolled oats, 1 tsp. baking powder, ½ tsp. ground fennel seed, and ½ tsp. ground ginger in a food processor to combine (about three 1-second pulses). Add 1 cup (4 oz.) shredded Gouda or sharp cheddar, ¼ cup curly parsley leaves and tender stems, packed, and ¼ cup mint leaves, packed, and pulse to incorporate (two to three 1-second pulses). Add ¾ cup unsweetened applesauce and 1 large egg, and pulse until a coarse dough forms, about 20 seconds. (You can roll out dough right away, but it’s much easier to work with it if you let it chill first.) Divide dough into two rounds and wrap each in plastic, or place in separate resealable containers, and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes and up to 24 hours.
IF NOT USING A FOOD PROCESSOR: Whisk 1 cup (113 g) whole wheat flour, ¾ cup (96 g) brown rice flour, ¾ cup (76 g) old-fashioned rolled oats, 1 tsp. baking powder, ½ tsp. ground fennel seed, and ½ tsp. ground ginger in a large bowl to combine. Add 1 cup (4 oz.) shredded Gouda or sharp cheddar and toss to coat the cheese. Finely chop ¼ cup curly parsley leaves and tender stems, packed and ¼ cup mint leaves, packed; set aside. Create a well in center of flour mixture. Add ¾ cup unsweetened applesauce and 1 large egg to well and mix with a wooden spoon, bringing flour into center until combined. Fold in chopped herbs. (You can roll out dough right away, but it’s much easier to work with it if you let it chill first.) Divide dough into two rounds and wrap each in plastic, or place in separate resealable containers, and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes and up to 24 hours.

Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat oven to 350°. Line two 18x13" baking sheets with parchment. Working with one dough ball at a time, roll out dough onto a lightly floured surface with a floured rolling pin, turning frequently, into a round ⅛–¼" thick. Using a 1–1½" cookie cutter, cut out as many treats as possible, transferring them to prepared baking sheets (the treats won’t spread much, so you can place them pretty close together). Gather scraps and wrap in plastic while you work on the second piece of dough. (Alternatively, divide dough with hands into ½" balls, then transfer to prepared baking sheets, and use the bottom of a floured glass or measuring cup to flatten.) Repeat with second piece of dough. Combine scraps from both pieces of dough and reroll to cut out more dog treats.

Bake dog treats, rotating baking sheets front to back and top to bottom halfway through, until cheese has bubbled up and treats have darkened slightly, 12–15 minutes.
Do Ahead: Dog treats can be baked, cooled, and stored at room temperature in an airtight container for up to 3 weeks or frozen for 3 months.

dog-treats-peanut-butter-and-pumpkin.name: Dog Treats (peanut Butter And Pumpkin)
instructions: Combine flour, eggs, pumpkin, peanut butter, salt, and cinnamon in a bowl; stir with a spatula until combined.

Transfer mixture to a work surface and work it with your hands until mixture starts to come together. Add 1 teaspoon water at a time (only if needed) to help make the dough workable, but don't add too much as it should be dry and stiff. Roll the dough to a thickness of 1/2 inch.
Cut into 1/2-inch pieces and transfer to a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until dog treats are golden brown and crunchy, about 40 minutes. Let cool before serving to your dog.

dogfish-ambotic-teleculinaria.name: Dogfish Ambotic

ingredients.item: 1/2 colher (café) de pimenta preta em grão

instructions: Tempere o peixe com sal e reserve. Aloure a cebola e os alhos, descascados e picados, num tacho com o azeite, em lume brando, depois acrescente a polpa de tomate e a água e mexa.

Junte os cardamomos, o gengibre, o açafrão, a pimenta e os coentros, tudo previamente esmagado, assim como a malagueta picada. Quando estiver a ferver, junte o peixe e deixe cozer durante cerca de 15 minutos. No final, adicione o vinagre e deixe ferver por mais 2 minutos.

Prepare o arroz: leve ao lume outro tacho com a manteiga e os alhos esmagados e deixe alourar. Acrescente o arroz, refogue muito bem e depois adicione a água, previamente aquecida. Tempere com sal, tape e deixe ferver durante 5 minutos. Mexa e cozinhe por mais 5 minutos, em lume brando. De seguida, mexa novamente e deixe cozinhar outros 5 minutos. Desligue o lume e deixe repousar tapado durante 10 minutos. Sirva como acompanhamento do ambotic de cação.

dogfish-stock-teleculinaria.name: Dogfish Stock

ingredients.item: Coentros q.b. sal e pimenta q.b.

instructions: Deite 1,5 l de água num tacho, junte 2 dentes de alho descascados, um pouco de azeite e alguns talos de coentros. Leve ao lume, deixe ferver, depois adicione o cação, tempere com sal e pimenta e cozinhe durante cerca de 5 a 10 minutos. Retire o cação e reserve a água.
Coloque um fio de azeite e os restantes alhos laminados num tacho e deixe refogar. Junte o pão partido em pedaços e a água de cozer o cação e misture bem (se necessário, adicione mais água).
Acrescente o cação limpo de pele e espinhas e envolva. Polvilhe tudo com mais coentros picados, retifique os temperos e sirva de imediato.

doggie-birthday-cake.name: Doggie Birthday Cake
instructions: Combine egg, honey, peanut butter, oil, and vanilla in a large bowl; blend well.
Stir in carrots until well-combined.
Sift together flour and baking soda and fold into carrot mixture.
Spoon cake batter into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, about 40 minutes.
Let cake cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then turn out onto a wire rack to cool completely.

doggie-biscuits.name: Doggie Biscuits
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Dissolve yeast in warm water until foamy, about 10 minutes.

In a large bowl, stir together the all-purpose, whole wheat, and rye flours with the bulgur, cornmeal and powdered milk. Stir in the yeast mixture, salt and chicken broth to form a stiff dough. Add more broth if necessary to hold dough together. Roll dough out to 1/4 inch thickness on a lightly floured surface. Cut into desired shapes using a cookie cutter. Place biscuits 1 inch apart onto an ungreased cookie sheet. Combine the egg and milk; brush onto the tops of the biscuits.
Bake in the preheated oven for 45 minutes, then turn off the oven and let the biscuits sit in the closed oven overnight to become extra hard and crunchy.

doggie-treats.name: Doggie Treats
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease cookie sheets. In a large bowl, stir together the rolled oats, margarine and boiling water. Set aside for 10 minutes.

Combine the cornmeal, sugar, and bouillon, stir into the oat mixture along with the egg and milk until smooth. fold in the shredded cheese. Gradually stir in the flour until a stiff but workable dough is formed. Knead the dough for a few turns. On a lightly floured surface, roll the dough out to 1/2 inch thickness. Cut with a bone-shaped cookie cutter or cut into 1x3 inch rectangles. Place treats 1 inch apart onto the prepared cookie sheets.
Bake for 35 to 40 minutes in the preheated oven, until golden brown. Remove from the baking sheet to cool completely on wire racks.

doll-cookies-teleculinaria.name: Doll Cookies
instructions: Deite o açúcar e a casca de limão no copo do robot e ligue 30 segundos na velocidade máxima. Junte o ovo, a manteiga e a farinha e ligue 30 segundos na velocidade 6. Deite a massa numa bancada polvilhada com farinha, estenda-a com o rolo deixando-a com cerca de 0,5 cm de espessura e corte-a com um corta massas em formato de boneco, como vê na foto.
Disponha metades de noz e amêndoas inteiras por cima, dobre cuidadosamente os "braços" para segurar e coloque num tabuleiro de forno polvilhado com farinha.
Leve ao forno pré-aquecido a 180ºC durante aproximadamente 20 minutos ou até as bolachinhas ficarem bem cozidas. Retire do forno, deixe arrefecer e sirva.

dolmadakia-yalanzi-political-argiro.name: Dolmadakia Yalanzi Political
instructions: Μουσκεύουμε το ρύζι σε μπολ με νερό για 1 ώρα.
Έπειτα το βάζουμε σε σουρωτήρι και το ξεπλένουμε κάτω από τρεχούμενο νερό να φύγει το άμυλο. Στραγγίζουμε καλά το ρύζι.
Στύβουμε 1 λεμονί στο ρύζι και ανακατεύουμε.
Ζεσταίνουμε το μισό λάδι και σε τηγάνι σοτάρουμε σε χαμηλή φωτιά τα ξερά κρεμμύδια και τα φρέσκα κρεμμύδια για 3 με 4 λεπτά.
Προσθέτουμε το ρύζι και ανακατεύουμε καλά, να λαδωθεί.
Προσθέτουμε 2 φλ. νερό και σιγοβράζουμε για 6 με 7 λεπτά, ίσα το ρύζι να πιει τα υγρά του.
Ρίχνουμε το αλάτι και το πιπέρι και το πασπαλίζουμε με τα μυρωδικά .
Τρίβουμε την ντομάτα μέσα στη γέμιση και την ανακατεύουμε καλά.
Προσθέτουμε το κουκουνάρι, τη σταφίδα και το υπόλοιπο λάδι.
Ζεματάμε τα αμπελόφυλλα για 1 με 2 λεπτά και τα βάζουμε σε μπολ με κρύο νερό να κοπεί ο βρασμός τους.
Τα στραγγίζουμε. Αφαιρούμε τυχόν χοντρά νεύρα στην άκρη του αμπελόφυλλου για τα ντολμαδάκια.
Παίρνουμε ένα αμπελόφυλλο στην παλάμη μας, με τα νεύρα προς τα πάνω, να τα βλέπουμε, βάζουμε μία κουταλιά γέμιση.
Κλείνουμε τα δύο πλαϊνά και έπειτα τυλίγουμε σε ρολό.
Ομοίως φτιάχνουμε και τα υπόλοιπα. Αν θέλουμε στρώνουμε όλη τη βάση από ένα ταψί με κληματόφυλλα ζεματισμένα.
Τοποθετούμε τα ντολμαδάκια, στην σειρά στο ταψί με την ένωση προς τα κάτω και κοντά κοντά το ένα με το άλλο.

dolmades-with-minced-meat-argiro.name: Dolmades With Minced Meat
instructions: Διαλέγουμε αμπελόφυλλα τρυφερά, τα πλένουμε και κόβουμε με ένα μαχαίρι το κοτσανάκι. Συνεχίζουμε με το ζεμάτισμα σε κατσαρόλα με νερό που βράζει σε μέτρια φωτιά.
Τα πιέζουμε να μπουν στο βραστό νερό και να καλυφθούν, η διαδικασία κρατάει για 2 με 3 λεπτά.
Αν όμως είναι εμπορίου, θέλουν 2 λεπτά επιπλέον, γιατί είναι πιο σκληρά λόγω της άρμης.
Κατευθείαν τα βουτάμε σε λεκάνη με κρύο νερό, για να κοπεί αμέσως ο βρασμός τους.
Τα αφήνουμε να στραγγίσουν.
Στρώνουμε σε μια σειρά στην κατσαρόλα, να καλυφθεί όλη η βάση της.
Σκορπάμε πάνω λίγα κοτσάνια μαϊντανού και άνηθου και λίγα πράσινα φύλλα κρεμμυδιών.
Κόβουμε ένα κρεμμύδι ξερό σε φέτες και το στρώνουμε και αυτό στον πάτο της κατσαρόλας.
Φτιάχνουμε δηλαδή ένα νόστιμο στρώμα σαν βάση που θα ενισχύσει την γεύση.

dominican-mangu-comedera.name: Dominican Mangú
instructions: En una olla al fuego vierte las 4 tazas de agua con la sal.
Retira la piel de los plátanos verdes y córtalos por la mitad. Luego, incorpóralos al agua hirviendo y deja que se cocinen durante 10 minutos.
Una vez cocidos, retíralos del fuego y tríturalos en un mortero. Conforme los trituras agrega el agua fría poco a poco y la mantequilla.
Corta la cebolla en aros.
En una sartén vierte el aceite y pon a fuego medio en la estufa, frie la cebolla hasta que esté transparente.

dominican-stewed-chicken-recipe-comedera.name: Dominican Stewed Chicken Recipe

ingredients.item: 25 oz (600 gr) de pollo troceado ((muslos, pechuga))

instructions: Inicia tu receta y agrega las piezas de pollo en un bol grande, agrega el zumo de limón, orégano, sal y pimienta al gusto. Mezcla y deja marinar por 5 minutos.
Mientras, trocea la cebolla y los ajíes en julianas. Filetea el ajo, y trocea el tomate y el celery. Reserva por separado.
Agrega el celery, la cebolla y el ajo troceado al pollo. Mezcla y deja marinar por 25 minutos.
Pasado ese tiempo, vas a calentar una cazuela o wok con aceite de oliva, baja el fuego y añade las tres cucharadas de azúcar. Deja caramelizar.
Cuando el azúcar esté caramelizada, añade las piezas de pollo y reserva el resto de ingredientes en donde se marinó.
Cocina el pollo a fuego bajo mientras e vaya caramelizando con el resto de ingredientes.
Una vez estén dorados, agrega un poco de agua. Tapa y cocina por 10 minutos a fuego medio.
En este punto le agregarás el tomate, los ajíes y el resto de los ingredientes que reservaste del marinado.
Mezcla, tapa y cocina por 5 minutos más.
Pasado ese tiempo, añade la salsa de tomate, las aceitunas, rectifica de sal y pimienta. Mezcla y cocina hasta que la salsa esté densa.
Apaga, deja reposar y sirve.
¡Disfruta!

dominican-three-strokes-recipe-comedera.name: Dominican Three Strokes Recipe

ingredients.item: 16  ozde  de salami dominicano, cortado en rebanadas finas (media libra )

instructions: Calienta el aceite a fuego medio en una sartén antiadherente. Fríe los huevos como te gusten.
Fríe también el queso hasta que esté dorado y crujiente.
Fríe el salami en el aceite calentado a fuego medio-alto, dándole la vuelta para que se dore por ambos lados.
Retíralo del aceite y déjalo reposar sobre una toalla de papel para que absorba el exceso de aceite.

dominican-water-bread-traditional-flavor.name: Dominican Water Bread, Traditional Flavor
dominican-water-bread-traditional-flavor.original_name: Pan de agua dominicano, sabor tardicional

ingredients.item: 1 kg de harina de trigo común

instructions: En un recipiente, coloca el agua tibia y le vas a agregar la levadura y el azúcar. Revolvemos y dejamos reposar por 10 minutos hasta que se active la levadura.

En un bol, coloca la harina y abrimos un espacio en el medio tipo volcán. Añade la sal y el agua con la levadura y el azúcar disuelto. Mezcla muy bien con una espátula y cuando la veas densa, amásala con las manos hasta obtener una homogénea.
Hacemos de nuestra masa una bola, la colocamos en un bol, la tapamos con un pañito húmedo y dejamos reposar por 1 hora.

Pasado ese tiempo, enharina tu encimera, vierte tu masa, la estirarás hasta que deshagas todo el gas que se formó durante el proceso de levado y arma tus panes. Dales una forma alargada y con un cuchillo le hacemos unas aberturas.
Batimos las claras y con un pincel barnizaremos cada uno de los panes. Coloquemos cada pan de agua en una bandeja con papel encerado y dejaremos reposar por 20 minutos más.
Precalentamos nuestro horno a 200° grados centígrados.
Introducimos los panes al horno y dejaremos cocinar por 40 minutos hasta que estén perfectamente dorados.
¡Listo!

dominican-yaroa-recipe-comedera.name: Dominican Yaroa Recipe

ingredients.item: 24 oz 24 onzas papas, pelada y cortada en tiras
16 oz de carne de res molida (454 grs.)
½ cup de plátanos maduros cortados en cubos (fritos (opcional))

instructions: Rocía las papas con el aceite de oliva, y añade la sal, así como la pimienta y el ajo en polvo. Mezcla muy bien con la mano.
Calienta el horno a 175 ºC [350 ºF], o la freidora de aire a la temperatura sugerida por el fabricante.
Colócalos en una bandeja de hornear y cuecelos en el horno precalentado durante 25 minutos, o hasta que adquieran un ligero color dorado y estén crujientes por los bordes.

Para la carne, calienta el aceite en una olla o sartén grande a fuego medio. Añade las cebollas y cuece y remueve hasta que se vuelvan transparentes. Añade el ajo y cuece removiendo durante un minuto.
Añade la carne molida, cocina y remueve.
Vierte la salsa de tomate, añade pimiento, sal y pimienta negra. Remueve y tapa. Cocina a fuego lento durante 3 minutos. Destapa y mezcla con los plátanos fritos.
Prueba y sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto. Retira del fuego.
Pon las papas en 4 platos. Cubre las papas con la carne caliente. Agrega el queso mozzarella y el cheddar.
Agrega mayonesa y ketchup al gusto.
Disfruta.

dominican-style-oatmeal.name: Dominican-style Oatmeal
instructions: Combine milk, oats, sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt in a saucepan. Add lemon zest, if using. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly, until oats are tender, about 2 minutes.

dominican-style-yellow-rice.name: Dominican-style Yellow Rice

ingredients.prep: white and light-green parts only, sliced 1/2" thick on a diagonal

instructions: Heat oil in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat. Add onion, bell pepper, celery, and scallions and cook, stirring often, until softened, about 5 minutes. Add garlic, bay leaf, cumin seeds, turmeric, and cayenne and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Add rice, stir to coat, then add broth and salt. Bring to a boil, stir once, and cover. Reduce heat to low and cook until rice is tender and liquid is absorbed, 15–18 minutes. Let stand 10 minutes. Uncover and fluff with a fork; stir in cilantro and parsley. Serve with Central American–Style Fried Chicken (click for recipe).

dominique-ansels-rainbow-mille-feuille.name: Dominique Ansel's Rainbow Mille-feuille

ingredients.item: Pastry bags or resealable plastic bags

instructions: Bring milk to a simmer in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Meanwhile, vigorously whisk egg yolks, granulated sugar, and cornstarch in a medium bowl until light in color and well incorporated.
Whisking constantly, stream one-third of warmed milk into yolk mixture and whisk until well blended.
Return pot with remaining milk to medium-low heat and add yolk mixture. Cook, whisking constantly, until pastry cream is very thick (think pudding) and begins to bubble, about 4 minutes.
Remove from heat and whisk in butter until fully incorporated.

Line a rimmed baking sheet or large shallow bowl with plastic wrap and spread pastry cream directly on plastic (the more spread out the pastry cream is, the faster it will cool). Cover with another piece of plastic wrap, pressing it directly against the surface to prevent a skin from forming, and chill at least 2 hours.
Meanwhile, preheat oven to 375°.
Unfold each puff pastry onto a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet. Using a fork, dock both pieces of dough, making rows across the surface about 1" apart.

Bake puff pastry until golden brown, 25–35 minutes. Remove baking sheets from oven and dust pastry lightly with powdered sugar. Return to oven and bake until sugar is caramelized, 1–2 minutes. Transfer sheets to wire racks and let cool.
Fold pastry cream with fruit purée (if using preserves, finished pastry cream will have some fruit pieces in it) in a medium bowl.
Divide pastry cream among 5 small bowls (you should have about 4 cups pastry cream to make 5 colors).
Add food coloring 1 drop at a time and mix until desired color is achieved. (Some good combinations: raspberry and red; blueberry and blue/purple; apricot and orange.)
Transfer each color to a piping bag and chill until ready to use.
Using a serrated knife, cut each puff pastry into six 4x6" rectangles.
Place a rectangle of pastry on a plate or platter. Cut off a small corner of piping bag and pipe the first layer of pastry cream on puff pastry, leaving a ⅛" border.
Place another pastry rectangle on top, then pipe the next flavor of pastry cream.
Repeat with remaining pastry rectangles and creams, creating 6 layers and ending with puff pastry.
Dust top layer of puff pastry with powdered sugar.
Serve immediately.

domino-arepa-recipe-a-venezuelan-comeder.name: Domino Arepa Recipe, A Venezuelan
domino-arepa-recipe-a-venezuelan-comeder.original_name: Receta de arepa dominó, un clásico venezolano

ingredients.item: 2 tazas  de harina de maíz precocida  ((preferiblemente marca p.a.n.))
1 taza  de caraotas negras (frijoles negros) (remojadas durante la noche)

instructions: En un bol grande, mezcla la harina de maíz con la sal. Agrega el agua poco a poco y amasa hasta obtener una mezcla suave pero consistente. Si la masa está demasiado seca, añade un poco más de agua.
Forma bolas con la masa y aplánalas para obtener discos de aproximadamente 1 cm de grosor.

Calienta un sartén antiadherente o una plancha con un poco de aceite. Cocina las arepas a fuego medio durante unos 5-7 minutos por cada lado, hasta que estén doradas y suenen huecas al golpearlas suavemente.
Cocina las caraotas negras en agua con la hoja de laurel hasta que estén tiernas (aproximadamente 1-2 horas). Puedes usar una olla de presión para acelerar el proceso.
En una sartén, sofríe la cebolla, el ajo y el pimiento con un poco de aceite hasta que estén dorados. Añade el comino, sal, y pimienta.
Incorpora las caraotas cocidas y revuelve bien. Cocina por unos 10 minutos para que los sabores se integren.
Una vez que las arepas estén listas, ábrelas con cuidado por el medio, creando un bolsillo.
Rellena las arepas con una buena porción de de caraotas negras y encima coloca el queso blanco rallado.
Sirve inmediatamente para disfrutar del contraste de sabores entre el queso fresco y las caraotas.

dons-sweet-tea.name: Don's Sweet Tea
instructions: Bring water to a boil in a large pot.
Stir sugar into boiling water until dissolved; remove from heat.
Add tea bags and let steep until desired strength is reached, 3 to 5 minutes.
Refrigerate tea until cold, at least 1 hour.

dont-go-heatin-the-house-gluten-free-fre.name: Don't Go Heatin' The House Gluten-free Fresh Cherry Crumble
instructions: Cube butter; place in the freezer until very firm, about 15 minutes.
Preheat an air fryer to 163°C (165 degrees C) according to manufacturer's instructions.
Combine cherries, 2 tablespoons sugar, and lemon juice in a large bowl until cherries are evenly coated; transfer to an air fryer-safe baking dish.
Whisk flour and 6 tablespoons sugar together in a bowl until well combined; cut in chilled butter using fingers until pea-sized pieces remain. Sprinkle over cherries; press down lightly.
Stir remaining 2 tablespoons sugar, vanilla powder, nutmeg, and cinnamon together in a bowl until well combined; sprinkle over cherries and flour mixture.

Cook in the preheated air fryer until slightly browned; check at 25 minutes if not yet browned. Continue cooking until slightly browned, checking at 5-minute intervals. Close air fryer drawer; turn air fryer off, leaving crumble inside for 10 minutes. Transfer crumble to a cutting board; cool slightly, about 5 minutes.

donauwelle-lezzet.name: Donauwelle
instructions: 1. Fırını 180 derecede ısıtın ve pişireceğiniz kaba yağlı kağıt serin.
2.  220 gr + 2 yemek kaşığı margarini bir kapta mikser yardımı ile krema kıvamına gelene kadar çırpın.
3.  Şeker, vanilya ve 5 yumurta sarısı ile birlikte çırpmaya devam edin.
4.  Un ve kabartma tozunu bir kapta harmanlayın.
5.  Yağlı karışım ile birleştirin.
6.  Yumurta aklarını bir kabın içerisine alın, mikser yardımı ile yumurta beyazları beyaz köpük haline dönüşene kadar çırpın.
7.  Bir spatula yardımıyla hamurdan kaşık kaşık alarak yavaşça diğer karışım ile yumurta aklarını birleştirin.
8.  Hamurun yarısını hazırladığınız fırın tepsisine dökün kalan kısmın içerisine kakao ekleyerek karıştırın.
9.  Kakaolu hamuru da üzerine ekleyin.
10.  Vişneleri en üste dizin.
11.  Yaklaşık 25-30 dakika pişirin.
12.  Ardından soğumaya bırakın.
13.  Kreması için 220 gr + 2 yemek kaşığı margarin, şeker ve yumurta sarısını çırpın.
14.  Krema kıvamına geldiğinde soğuk kekin üzerine yayın.
15.  Kremayı kısık ateşte kaynatın, altını kapatın.
16. Çikolatayı ince ince doğrayın, krema içersine sererek erimesini bekleyin.
17.  Ilıdıktan sonra kek üzerine dökün ve tamamı soğuduktan sonra servis edin.
18.  Afiyet olsun.

doner-gratin-recipe-lezzet.name: Doner Gratin Recipe

ingredients.item: 100 gr rendelenmiş kaşar peyniri veya mozzarella
Yarım tatlı kaşığı kırmızı toz biber veya paprika
Tavuk yerine dana veya hindi döner kullanabilirsiniz.
Düşük yağlı veya az tuzlu döner tercih ederek daha hafif bir versiyon elde edebilirsiniz.
Ev yapımı döner kullanmak, tuz ve baharat kontrolü açısından avantaj sağlar.
Klasik krema yerine süt veya light krema kullanılabilir.
Vegan bir alternatif için badem sütü veya soya kreması tercih edebilirsiniz.
Kaşar yerine mozzarella, cheddar veya karışık peynir kullanabilirsiniz.
Daha hafif bir tat için peynir miktarını azaltabilirsiniz.
Kırmızı biber yerine yeşil veya sarı biber kullanılabilir.
Mantar yerine kabak, patlıcan veya brokoli ekleyerek farklı tatlar oluşturabilirsiniz.
Soğan yerine pırasa veya taze soğan kullanabilirsiniz.
Kırmızı toz biber yerine paprika, pul biber veya isot ekleyebilirsiniz.
Kekik yerine taze fesleğen veya maydanoz kullanılabilir.
Zeytinyağı yerine ayçiçek yağı veya mısırözü yağı kullanabilirsiniz.
Tavada soteleme yerine fırında pişirme ile yağ kullanımını azaltabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Fırını 180 derece’ye ısıtın.
2. Tavada zeytinyağını ısıtın, soğan ve sarımsağı 2–3 dakika kavurun.
3. Kırmızı biber ve mantarları ekleyip 5 dakika soteleyin.
4. Döneri tavaya ekleyin, tuz, karabiber ve kırmızı toz biber ile tatlandırın ve 2–3 dakika karıştırın.
5. Karışımı fırın kabına alın, üzerine kremayı dökün ve rendelenmiş peyniri serpin.
6. Önceden ısıt��lmış fırında 15–20 dakika, peynir eriyip üzeri kızarana kadar pişirin.
7. Fırından çıkardıktan sonra taze kekik veya maydanoz ile süsleyerek servis edin.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

doner-kebab-lezzet.name: Doner Kebab
instructions: 1. Soğan ve sarımsağı rendeleyip geniş bir kaseye alın.
2.  Zeytinyağı, süt ve baharatları ilave edip karıştırın.
3.  Biftekleri ilave edin.
4. Streç film ile kaseyi sıkı bir şekilde kapatıp buzdolabında 3-4 saat marine edin.
5.  Marine olmuş etleri üst üste gelecek şekilde dizin.
6. Streç filmle sıkıca sarın.
7.  Derin dondurucuda 1 gece bekletin.
8.  Döneri derin dondurucudan çıkarıp ince ince dilimleyin.
9. Ayçiçeği yağını tavada ısıtın.
10.  Dilimlediğiniz dönerleri bu yağda kızartın.
11.  Sos için gerekli malzemeleri küçük bir tencerede 3-4 dakika pişirin.
12. Pideyi küp şeklinde doğrayın.
13.  Yapışmaz yüzeyli tavada ısıtıp servis tabağına alın.
14.  Üzerine hazırladığınız sostan gezdirin.
15. Pişen dönerleri yerleştirdikten sonra kalan sosu dönerin üzerine gezdirin.
16.  Yoğurt ile servis edin.
17.  Afiyet olsun.

doner-kebab-round-argiro.name: Doner Kebab Round

ingredients.item: Πίτες για σουβλάκια (ψημένες και κομμένες στα 4)
Πίτες για σουβλάκια (ψημένες και κομμένες στα 4)

instructions: Βάζουμε όλα τα υλικά σε ένα μπολ ή τα ζυμώνουμε στον κάδο του μίξερ, στο ζυμωτήριο.
Ζυμώνουμε πολύ καλά τον κιμά μέχρι να αλλάξει χρώμα και να ξεκολλάει από τα χέρια.
Λαδώνουμε πολύ καλά μεγάλο ρηχό ταψί 34 ή 36 εκ.
Απλώνουμε το ντονέρ με τα δάχτυλα και το πατάμε να απλωθεί σε λεπτή στρώση – φροντίζουμε να είναι παντού ισόπαχο.
Το ραντίζουμε με λίγο νερό με τα δάχτυλα.
Ψήνουμε στο γκριλ του φούρνου για περίπου 30 λεπτά.
Φροντίζουμε να το μετακινήσουμε στην πιο κάτω σχάρα του φούρνου, αν αρπάξει γρήγορα από πάνω.
Μόλις το βγάλουμε από το φούρνο το κόβουμε σε λεπτές φέτες (γύρο).
Σε μία πιατέλα, βάζουμε τις ψημένες πίτες .
Σε μια πλευρά βάζουμε το κρεμμύδι, την ντομάτα και στη μέση βάζουμε το γύρο.
Σερβίρουμε με σως γιαουρτιού . Πασπαλίζουμε με πάπρικα και λίγο ωμό ελαιόλαδο από πάνω.

doner-over-rice-lezzet.name: Doner Over Rice
instructions: 1. Pilav için; Bir tavaya sıvı yağ koyun.
2.  Pirinçleri önceden ıslatıp güzelce durulayın.
3. Ardından fazla suyunu süzün.
4.  Pirinçleri tavaya ekleyip kavurun.
5. Üzerine tuzu ekledikten sonra, uygun miktarda ılık su ekleyin.
6. Ocağın altını kısıp kapağını kapatın ve pişmeye bırakın.
7. Patatesin kabuklarını soyup ince ince dilimleyin.
8.  Başka bir tavada patatesleri kızartın.
9. Et döneri mikrodalgada maksimum derecede yaklaşık 8 dakika kadar pişirin.
10. Eğer mikrodalga yoksa, tavada paketin üzerinde verildiği şekilde kızartabilirsiniz.
11. Pişen pilavı servis tabağının kenarına koyun.
12.  Üzerine kızarttığınız et döneri ekleyin.
13. Kenarlarına ise patates kızartması, domates ve kornişon turşu ekleyip servis edin.
14.  Afiyet olsun.
15. 1 Porsiyon Pilav Üstü Döner Kaç Kalori?Pilav üstü et dönerin 100 gramlık porsiyonu, yaklaşık 210 kaloridir.

doner-recipe-at-home-lezzet.name: Doner Recipe At Home

ingredients.item: 600 gr dana kontrfile veya antrikot (çok ince dilimlenmiş)
1 yemek kaşığı sirke veya limon suyu
1 yemek kaşığı soğan suyu (opsiyonel ama lezzeti artırır)

instructions: 1. İncecik dilimlenmiş etleri geniş bir kaba alın.
2.  Yoğurdu, yağı, salçayı, baharatları, sirke/limon suyunu ve sarımsağı ekleyin.
3. Hepsini iyice karıştırıp etleri bu karışıma bulayın.
4.  Kabı kapatıp en az 3 saat, tercihen bir gece buzdolabında bekletin.
5. Tezgâha geniş bir streç film yayın.
6.  Marine edilmiş etleri üst üste dizin.
7. Sıkı bir rulo haline getirin ve streçle tamamen sarın.
8.  Derin dondurucuya koyup 4–5 saat yarı donmuş kıvama gelmesini sağlayın.
9. Yarı donmuş döneri çıkarıp bıçakla ince ince dilimleyin.
10. Döküm tavayı çok az yağ ile ısıtın.
11.  Dilimleri yüksek ateşte, arkalı önlü çevirerek pişirin.
12. Hafif kızarıp izleri belirince ocaktan alın.
13.  Lavaş arasına domates, soğan, maydanoz ve yoğurtlu sos ekleyerek dürüm yapın.
14. İsterseniz pilav üstü döner olarak da servis edin.
15.  Afiyet olsun.

donnies-blueberry-coffee-cake.name: Donnie's Blueberry Coffee Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Butter a 9x9-inch cake pan.
Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt. Set aside.
Cream sugar, butter, and vanilla together in another bowl. Add egg and beat well.

Using a wooden spoon, stir in dry ingredients in 3 additions alternately with the milk (ending with dry) just until flour is incorporated. Do not overbeat. Fold in blueberries. Turn into the prepared cake pan and spread evenly with a spatula. Frozen blueberries make dough very stiff, so pressing with moistened fingertips works better for me. Combine 1 tablespoon sugar and cinnamon in a small bowl; sprinkle on top of batter.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 40 minutes.

dontourma-ice-cream-argiro.name: Dontourma Ice Cream
instructions: Ξεκινάμε να φτιάξουμε το ανατολίτικο παγωτό ντοντουρμάς, βράζοντας πρώτα το γάλα.
Το αφήνουμε να κρυώσει.
Χτυπάμε καλά τους κρόκους με τη ζάχαρη και μια κουταλιά φρέσκο βούτυρο, προσθέτουμε το γάλα και το βάζουμε λίγο στη φωτιά χωρίς να πάρει βράση.
Το αφήνουμε να κρυώσει και προσθέτουμε τα ασπράδια χτυπημένα σε σφιχτή μαρέγκα και τη μαστίχα.
Το βάζουμε στο ψυγείο να πήξει (στην κατάψυξη) και μετά από δύο ώρες το ξαναχτυπάμε στο μίξερ.
Εάν έχουμε παγωτομηχανή, το χτυπάμε μόνο μια φορά.
Σερβίρουμε με γλυκό κουταλιού τριαντάφυλλο ή βύσσινο κατά τον παραδοσιακό τρόπο, ή με γλυκό φιστίκι, σύμφωνα με τη σύγχρονη γαστρονομία.

donut-lezzet.name: Donut
instructions: 1. Çikolata kreması için, yumurta sarıları, mısır nişastası, süt, toz şeker ve bir tutam tuzu bir sos tenceresine alın.
2.  Tel çırpıcı ile sürekli karıştırarak pişirin.
3.  Ocaktan alıp içine, küçük parçalara böldüğünüz çikolatayı ekleyin ve eriyene kadar karıştırın.
4.  Vanilya özü ve tereyağını ilave edip karıştırmaya devam edin.
5.  Karışımı bir kaba aktarıp üzerini streç film ile kapatın ve buzdolabında 2-3 saat bekletin.
6.  Donut için, küçük parçalara böldüğünüz çikolatayı ısıya dayanıklı bir kaba alın ve mikrodalga fırında eritin.
7.  Karıştırıp kenara alın.
8.  Tereyağı ve toz şekeri çırpma kabına alıp krema kıvamına gelinceye kadar çırpın.
9.  Yumurta, vanilya özü ve erittiğiniz çikolatayı ekleyip çırpmaya devam edin.
10.  Ayrı bir kapta un, kakao, kabartma tozu, karbonat ve bir tutam tuzu harmanlayın.
11.  Tereyağlı karışımı ve yayık ayranını ekleyip tüm malzeme iyice özdeşleşinceye kadar karıştırın.
12.  Hamuru streç filmle sarıp buzdolabına alın ve 30 dakika bekletin.
13.  Hamuru unladığınız tezgaha yayın ve bir merdane yardımıyla 2-3 santim kalınlıkta olacak şekilde açın.
14.  Yuvarlak bir kalıp yardımıyla hamurdan parçalar kesin.
15.  Daha sonra küçük bir kalıpla hamurların tam göbeğinden ufak yuvarlaklar çıkarın.
16.  Tüm hamur bitene kadar aynı işlemi tekrarlayın.
17.  Kestiğiniz hamurları kızgın yağda renkleri dönünceye kadar kızartın.
18.  Kağıt havlu üzerine alarak fazla yağını çektirin.
19.  Çikolatalı kremayı çok ince uçlu bir sıkma torbasına alın.
20.  Donutların her birinden 3-4 delik açarak içlerine çikolatalı kremayı sıkın.
21.  Glazür için, tereyağı, süt, mısır şurubu ve vanilya özünü küçük bir tencereye alın.
22.  Karıştırarak ısıtın ve ocaktan alın.
23.  Küçük parçalara böldüğünüz çikolatayı ekleyin ve eriyinceye kadar karıştırın.
24.  Pudra şekerini de ilave edip karıştırmaya devam edin.
25.  Her bir donutu glazüre batırın.
26.  Bir servis tabağına alıp 15 dakika bekletin.
27.  Rendelenmiş çikolatalar ve bitter çikolata şekerlemesi ile süsleyip servis yapın.
28. Muhteşem lezzetiyle herkesi kendine hayran bırakan çikolatalı donut tarifini de deneyebilirsiniz.

donut-dessert-with-mastic-mastic-lezzet.name: Donut Dessert With Mastic Mastic
instructions: 1. İlk önce şerbeti hazırlayın.
2.  Toz şeker, su ve limon suyunu bir tencereye alın.
3.  Kısık ateşte 20 dakika kaynatıp soğumaya bırakın.
4.  Mayayı ılık su ve 1 yemek kaşığı şekerle bir kasede eritin.
5.  Unu geniş bir kaba eleyin.
6.  Ortasını havuz gibi açın.
7.  Mayalı suyu, havanda ezilmiş damla sakızı ve tuzu ekleyip iyice karıştırın.
8.  Gerektiği takdirde ılık su ilave edin.
9.  Hamurun üzerini örtün ve yaklaşık 1 saat mayalanmaya bırakın.
10.  Yağı bir tencereye alıp kızdırın.
11.  Lokma için hazırladığınız hamuru elinizle sıkarak ıslatılmış bir çay kaşığı ile lokma parçalarını koparıp kızgın yağın içine atın.
12.  Karıştırarak altın rengini alıncaya kadar pişirin.
13.  Lokmaları kevgirle çıkarıp şerbetin içine atın.
14.  Bir iki dakika bekletin ve servis tabağına alın.
15.  Üzerine fıstık ve tarçın serperek servis yapın.
16.  Afiyet olsun.
17. Kaymak ve dondurma ile birlikte sunabileceğiniz klasik lokma tatlısına buradan ulaşabilirsiniz.

donut-pan-egg-sandwiches.name: Donut Pan Egg Sandwiches

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Whisk eggs in a large bowl until consistent and no egg whites are visible. Whisk in salt and pepper. Pour eggs into the donut pan, dividing evenly amongst the 6 cavities. Crumble cooked sausage evenly over eggs, and sprinkle each cavity with chives.
Bake in the preheated oven until the egg rounds are set and puffed up, 10 to 12 minutes.
While cooking, split the bagels and place on a lined baking sheet. Top one half of each bagel with cheese. Bake until golden brown and the cheese is melted, 4 to 5 minutes.
Run a knife along the edge of the donut pan to remove the egg rounds, then place one on each bagel half. Top with hot sauce, if desired. Serve immediately.

donut-recipe-lezzet.name: Donut Recipe

ingredients.item: ⅓ su bardağı margarin veya tereyağ
4 yemek kaşığı sıcak su (gerekirse biraz daha ekleyebilirsiniz)

instructions: 1. Ilık suyun içinde mayayı ve bir çay kaşığı şekeri karıştırın, 5–10 dakika bekleyin; maya köpürmeye başlayacaktır.
2. Büyük bir karıştırma kabında süt, şeker, tuz, yumurtalar ve katı yağı karıştırın.
3. Mayalı suyu ekleyin ve ardından azar azar unu ilave ederek yumuşak ama ele yapışmayan bir hamur yoğurun.
4. Hamuru temiz bir kaba alın, üzerini streç film veya nemli bir bezle kapatın ve ılık bir ortamda yaklaşık 1 saat mayalanmaya bırakın.
5.  Hamur iki katına çıkana kadar bekleyin.
6. Mayalanan hamuru unlanmış tezgah üzerinde açın, yaklaşık 1–2 cm kalınlığında bir hamur elde edin.
7. Bardak veya donut kalıbıyla yuvarlaklar kesin; ortalarına küçük delikler açın.
8. Derin bir tavada veya fritözde sıvı yağı 175–180°C’ye ısıtın.
9. Donutları altın rengi alana kadar her iki tarafını kızartın (her bir taraf yaklaşık 1–2 dakika).
10. Kızaran donutları kağıt havlu üzerine alın ve fazla yağını süzdürün.
11. Tereyağını küçük bir tencerede eritin.
12. Pudra şekeri ve vanilyayı ekleyin, karıştırın.
13. Sıcak suyu yavaş yavaş ekleyin ve pürüzsüz bir kıvam elde edene kadar karıştırın.
14. Donutları glazürün içine batırın veya üzerine dökün.
15. Üzerine isteğe göre renkli şekerlemeler veya hindistancevizi serpebilirsiniz.
16.  Afiyet olsun.

donut-shape-teleculinaria.name: Donut Shape

ingredients.item: 1 colher  café de canela em pó

instructions: Deite a farinha para uma tigela, junte o sal e a canela e misture. Adicione os ovos, mexa, junte a aguardente e depois o leite, em fio e mexendo sempre até ficar uma mistura lisa. Passe esta mistura pelo passador de rede e deixe repousar durante 40 minutos.

Leve ao lume um tacho com óleo abundante, coloque dentro as formas de filhó e deixe-as aquecer. Mexa de novo a massa, escorra as formas e mergulhe-as na massa mas sem deixar a massa ultrapassar os bordos. Mergulhe no óleo quente até a massa se soltar, deixe fritar até ficarem douradinhas, retire e deixe escorrer.
Repita a operação até acabar a massa, depois polvilhe com açúcar e canela e sirva decoradas a gosto.

donut-with-cream-cheese-glaze-lezzet.name: Donut With Cream Cheese Glaze
instructions: 1. Bir ölçü çörek hamuru hazırlayıp mayalanmaya bırakın.
2.  Hamur beklerken kuru üzümleri, portakal suyunu ve toz şekerin yarısını bir sos tenceresine alın.
3.  Orta ateşte 6-8 dakika suyu çekilene ve şeker çözülene kadar karıştırarak pişirin.
4.  Oda sıcaklığına gelmesini bekledikten sonra 1/4’ünü daha sonra karamelize etmek için ayırıp kenara alın.
5.  Tereyağını, kalan toz şekeri ve 1 yemek kaşığı portakal suyunu bir kasede karıştırıp kenara alın.
6.  Hamuru unlu bir yüzeyde, 60 cm x 28 cm’lik bir dikdörtgen olacak şekilde açın.
7.  Kenarlarını keserek düzeltin.
8.  Tereyağı karışımını sürün ve üzerine kalan kuru üzüm karışımını eşit bir katman olacak şekilde ekleyin.
9.  Hamuru keserek 3 cm x 60 cm’lik 8 eşit parçaya bölün.
10.  Şeritleri sıkıca yuvarlayarak kıvrımlar haline getirin.
11.  Pişirme kağıdı serilmiş 2 büyük fırın tepsisine, aralarında pişerken yayılmaları için boşluklar bırakarak yerleştirin.
12.  Streç filmle kaplayıp, oda ısısında 30 dakika kabarmaları için bırakın.
13.  Fırınınızı 180 dereceye ayarlayın.
14. Kalan kuru üzüm karışımını pişirme kağıtlı küçük bir fırın tepsisine yayın.
15.  8 dakika karamelize olana ve hafif gevrekleşene kadar pişirin.
16.  Soğuması için bekletin.
17.  Yaptığınız kıvrımlara fırça ile çırpılmış yumurtayı sürüp, fırında 20-25 dakika, hafif kızarana kadar pişirin.
18.  Fırından çıkarıp tel ızgara üzerine alarak soğumasını bekleyin.
19. Krem peynirli glazürü yapmak için krem peynirini, pudra şekerini ve sütü bir kasede pürüzsüz olana kadar çırpın.
20.  Çöreklerin üzerine sürün ve karamelize ettiğiniz kuru üzümleri serpiştirerek servis yapın.
21. Zencefilli karanfilli kuşburnu çayı ile keyifli anlar yaşayın.

donuts-argiro.name: Donuts
instructions: Όλα τα υλικά πρέπει να είναι σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου.
Στο μίξερ βάζουμε το αλεύρι, τη ζάχαρη, τη βανίλια και την μαγιά. Ανακατεύουμε. Αν χρησιμοποιήσετε φρέσκια μαγιά, πρέπει πρώτα να την ενεργοποιήσετε .
Αναμειγνύουμε το γιαούρτι με το γάλα, το αλάτι, το νερό και τα αυγά.
Τα ρίχνουμε στα στερεά υλικά και ζυμώνουμε μέχρι η ζύμη να γίνει ελαστική, για 5-6 λεπτά.
Ένα-ένα και πάντα με το μίξερ σε λειτουργία, ρίχνουμε το μαλακό βούτυρο σε κομμάτια.
Η ζύμη θα είναι ελαστική και θα μοιάζει με μεγάλη τσίχλα.
Τη μαζεύουμε σε μπάλα και την αφήνουμε σε λαδωμένο μπολ σκεπασμένη να διπλασιαστεί σε όγκο.
Αυτό παίρνει από 45 λεπτά ως και δυο ώρες, ανάλογα την θερμοκρασία του χώρου.
Αλευρώνουμε τον πάγκο, αδειάζουμε τη ζύμη, τη διπλώνουμε σε τέσσερα σημεία και αναποδογυρίζουμε.
Ανοίγουμε με πλάστη σε χοντρό φύλλο με πάχος 0,5 εκ.
Κόβουμε τα ντόνατς με κουπ πατ.
Έχουμε αραδιάσει κομμάτια αντικολλητικό χαρτί σε 2 μεγάλα ταψιά.
Βάζουμε επάνω τα ντόνατς.
Αφήνουμε να σταθούν μέσα σε σβηστό φούρνο να ξαναφουσκώσουν για 35-40 λεπτά.
Τηγανίζουμε λίγα λίγα τα ντόνατς μέχρι να ροδίσουν σε μέτρια φωτιά.
Βγάζουμε σε απορροφητικό χαρτί.

donuts-fried-doughnuts-teleculinaria.name: Donuts - Fried Doughnuts

ingredients.item: 7 g de fermento de padeiro em pó

instructions: Prepare a massa: misture a farinha com o fermento. Junte o leite, a manteiga amolecida, as gemas, o açúcar e as especiarias e comece a amassar. Adicione a pitada de sal, trabalhe a massa até ficar bem homogénea e elástica e depois coloque-a numa tigela enfarinhada. Deixe levedar, até dobrar de volume.

Estique a massa sobre a bancada polvilhada com farinha, até ficar com uma espessura de 1,5 cm. Corte os donuts, com a ajuda de um cortante de 10 cm de diâmetro. Corte depois o centro com um cortante mais pequeno (com cerca de 3 cm de diâmetro). Disponha-os num tabuleiro e deixe levedar novamente, durante cerca de 30 minutos.
Após o tempo indicado, frite em óleo quente e abundante, retire-os e deixe-os escorrer sobre papel absorvente.

Prepare a cobertura: misture o açúcar com o cacau e adicione o leite, em fio e mexendo sempre, até obter um preparado liso. Cubra a superfície dos donuts com o creme e deixe secar. Polvilhe com raspas de chocolate antes de servir.

donuts-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Donuts In The Oven
instructions: Βάζουμε σε ένα μπολ το χλιαρό γάλα, τη ζάχαρη, το λιωμένο βούτυρο, τη βανίλια, τη μαγιά και με το σύρμα τα ανακατεύουμε καλά.
Προσθέτουμε τα χτυπημένα αυγά και ανακατεύουμε με το σύρμα.
Λίγο λίγο ρίχνουμε το αλεύρι ανακατεύοντας με κουτάλι.
Όταν αρχίσει να μαζεύεται η ζύμη σε μπάλα, ζυμώνουμε με αλευρωμένο το χέρι μέχρι να καθαρίσει τελείως το μπολ.
Αν κολλάει πολύ στα χέρια, πασπαλίζουμε λίγο αλεύρι και βγάζουμε τη ζύμη στον πάγκο μας.
Σε ελαφρά αλευρωμένη επιφάνεια ζυμώνουμε πολύ καλά τη ζύμη για 5′  τραβώντας την και ανοίγοντάς την.
Όσο πιο πολύ δουλέψουμε τη ζύμη τόσο πιο αφράτα θα γίνουν τα γεμιστά ντόνατς στο φούρνο.
Η ζύμη στο τέλος πρέπει να είναι εύπλαστη, απαλή και πολύ αφράτη.
Μαζεύουμε όλες τις ενώσεις της ζύμης από κάτω και την ακουμπάμε σε λαδωμένο μπολ.
Σκεπάζουμε πολύ καλά αεροστεγώς τη ζύμη και την αφήνουμε να διπλασιαστεί ανάλογα με τη θερμοκρασία του χώρου γύρω στη 1 ώρα και 15′  με 1 ώρα και 30΄.
Αδειάζουμε την αφράτη ζύμη στον πάγκο και τη ζυμώνουμε καλά να ξεφουσκώσει.
Δεν χρησιμοποιούμε καθόλου αλεύρι. Αν λίγο κολλάει στο χέρι, λαδώνουμε ελαφρά τα δάχτυλα.
Πλάθουμε σε χοντρό μακρύ ρόλο ζύμης.
Με κοφτερό μαχαίρι την κόβουμε σε 12 ίσα μέρη.
Πιέζουμε ελαφρά κάθε κομμάτι ζύμης στην παλάμη μας να γίνει πλακέ.
Γεμίζουμε με 1 κ.γλ. ό,τι γέμιση μας αρέσει, κομμάτια σοκολάτας, σφιχτή μαρμελάδα ή μερέντα και κλείνουμε τη γέμιση σε σφαιρικό σχήμα.
Μαζεύουμε και τσιμπάμε τις ενώσεις να κλείσουμε τη γέμιση μέσα στη ζύμη.
Με τις ενώσεις της ζύμης από κάτω, ακουμπάμε τα ντόνατς σε λαδόκολλα ψησίματος πάνω στη λαμαρίνα.
Ακουμπάμε τα ντόνατς αραιά μεταξύ τους γιατί φουσκώνουν.
Πιέζουμε ελαφρά την επιφάνεια τους να πλατύνουν.
Σκεπάζουμε τα ντόνατς και τα αφήνουμε να σταθούν για 20΄ σε ζεστό σημείο να ξεκουραστούν.

donuts-recipe-comedera.name: Donuts Recipe

ingredients.item: 20 gr de levadura fresca o 10 de levadura seca

instructions: Para comenzar, sacaremos la mantequilla del refrigerador para que se vaya suavizando a temperatura ambiente.
Para continuar, vas a necesitar que la leche y el agua estén tibias. Puedes calentarlas en el microondas, entre 20 y 30 segundos, pero no más, para no quemar la levadura.
Luego, vamos a disolver la levadura en una mezcla de agua y leche, y dejaremos que se repose durante 10 minutos.
Mientras tanto, pondremos otros ingredientes directamente en el bol de la batidora : la harina, la sal y el azúcar. Hay que mezclarlos muy lentamente para no levantar una polvareda.

Cuando se termine el tiempo de reposo de la levadura, mezcla con los polvos en la batidora y agrega también el contenido del huevo, la vainilla y 1/4 de taza de la mantequilla que has dejado fuera del refrigerador para que se suavice.
Mezcla con la batidora hasta obtener una mezcla uniforme. Deja de mezclar cuando llegues al punto en el que, al tomar una bolita de masa con los dedos, no se te quede pegada a las manos.

Para continuar, prepara una superficie limpia para amasar. Lo ideal es que sea lisa, de madera, piedra o de fórmica. Debe estar bien limpia, y hay que espolvorearla con una fina capa de harina, para evitar que la masa se pegue.
Coloca la masa en esta superficie y amasa durante 10 minutos, para que la masa se vuelva más esponjosa. Puedes ayudarte con un rodillo, si cuentas con él.
Entonces engrasa un bol con un chorrito de aceite, haz una bola con la masa, colócala en el bol y cubre con un paño limpio o con un trozo de film transparente.
Lleva el bol a un lugar fresco y seco, que puede ser el horno cerrado (sin calentarlo). Deja que la masa repose durante una hora y media.
Luego, limpia la superficie que has utilizado para amasar.
Cuando se termine el tiempo de reposo de la masa, vuelve a enharinar la superficie de amasado, y coloca la bola de masa en ella.
Aplana con un rodillo, hasta que la masa quede con un espesor de poco más de un dedo.
Ahora, antes de darle forma a las donas, engrasa un molde grande donde puedas irlas colocando, una vez que hayas dado forma a la masa. Para esto, utiliza un chorrito de aceite.

Entonces comienza a cortar los donuts. Puedes utilizar cortadores de galletas, o en su defecto, cualquier otro utensilio de cocina con el tamaño deseado : bolea pequeños, moldes, vasos, frascos de vidrio. Usa moldes de galleta más pequeños para hacer el hoyito del centro de cada donut (si deseas usar la forma tradicional).
A medida que cada donut quede cortada, colócala en el recipiente engrasado. Sin embargo, asegúrate de no pegarlos entre ellos. Deja un espacio de un poco más que un dedo de ancho.

Apila los trozos de masa que vaya sobrando, a medida que vas cortando, y cuando hayas terminado de darle forma a los donuts, amasa el sobrante de la masa y vuelve a extenderlo con la ayuda del rodillo. Corta y realiza más donuts, hasta que se acabe toda la masa.
Tapa los donuts con un trapo limpio y deja reposar durante 30 minutos más.

dont-passover-this-party-mix.name: Don’t Passover This Party Mix
instructions: Preheat oven to 325°. Line a large-rimmed baking sheet with a silicone baking mat or parchment paper. Toss matzo and nuts in a large bowl to evenly distribute.

Whisk egg whites in a medium bowl until frothy. Add brown sugar, granulated sugar, soy sauce, garam masala, salt, pepper, and cayenne and whisk until thick. Pour over nuts and matzo and fold to coat. Spread out on prepared baking sheet and bake, stirring occasionally, until caramelized, 35–45 minutes.
Remove from oven, drizzle butter over, and toss to coat. Let cool.
Do Ahead: Party mix can be made 5 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

doogh.name: Doogh

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Blend yogurt, rose petals (if using), salt, and ½ cup mint leaves in a blender until only tiny flecks of mint remain. Pour in club soda and mix with a fork or wooden spoon, scraping down sides of blender, until everything is incorporated.
Pour doogh among 4 iced-filled glasses and garnish with mint springs.

door-county-cherry-bounce.name: Door County Cherry Bounce
instructions: Put cherries in a clean, 1-quart glass jar; add sugar. Fill the rest of the jar with vodka. Place lid on jar and shake. Cherries will float in the beginning and will settle in time.
Store jar in a cool, dark area for 1 to 4 months, shaking jar occasionally.

dorade-with-potatoes-and-burst-tomato-sa.name: Dorade With Potatoes And Burst Tomato Sauce
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast pine nuts on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden brown, about 4 minutes. Let cool.
Toss tomatoes and 1 Tbsp. oil on another baking sheet; season with salt. Roast until softened, 25–30 minutes; let cool slightly.
Meanwhile, place raisins in a medium bowl and pour in boiling water to cover. Let sit until plump and softened, 8–10 minutes. Drain and return to bowl.
Add pine nuts, garlic, mint, capers, vinegar, red pepper flakes, and remaining 2 Tbsp. oil to raisins and mix well. Gently mix in tomatoes; season with salt.

Increase oven temperature to 425°. Cook potatoes in a pot of boiling salted water until fork-tender, 15–18 minutes. Drain; let cool, then slice lengthwise ¼" thick. Toss potatoes with lemon, mint sprigs, garlic, bay leaves, and ¼ cup oil in a shallow 3-qt. baking dish; season with salt and pepper. Pour wine over.
Season fillets with salt and pepper. Place, skin side up, on top of potato mixture and drizzle with remaining 2 Tbsp. oil. Roast until fillets are cooked through, 12–18 minutes.
Transfer fillets to a platter, placing skin side up, and tent with foil to keep warm. Continue to roast potatoes until edges are browned, 10–15 minutes. Serve dorade with tomato sauce and potatoes.

doreens-pork-and-sauerkraut.name: Doreen's Pork And Sauerkraut
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Spray a large roasting pan with cooking spray. Place pork roast in the pan and arrange sauerkraut around it. Place apple wedges on top of the sauerkraut. Sprinkle brown sugar over roast and apples. Cover roasting pan with aluminum foil.
Bake roast in the preheated oven until roast is slightly pink in the center, about 2 hours. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 63°C (63 degrees C).
Remove roast from oven and allow to rest in a warm area before slicing, about 10 minutes.

dorito-crusted-fried-mac-n-cheese-balls.name: Dorito Crusted Fried Mac 'n Cheese Balls
instructions: Add the Doritos to the bowl of a food processor. Pulse until finely ground and the texture resembles panko. Pour into a shallow bowl and set aside.
Place 1 cup flour and the beaten eggs into 2 separate shallow bowls. Set aside.
In a large bowl, mix together the leftover mac and cheese, cheddar, and mozzarella until well combined. If the mixture does not stick together, add ¼ cup flour and mix until evenly combined.
Roll about ⅓ cup of the mac and cheese mixture into a compact ball, tightly pressing it together with your hands. Repeat with the remaining mac and cheese mixture until you have 9 balls.
Transfer the balls to the fridge to stiffen up for about 20 minutes.
Working one at a time, roll the balls in the flour, beaten eggs, then crushed Doritos. Shake off any excess and set the coated ball on a parchment-lined sheet tray. Repeat with the remaining balls.
Heat the canola oil in a large heavy-bottomed pot fitted with a deep-fry thermometer over medium heat until it reaches 177°C (180°C).
Working in batches of 2–3 at a time, fry the balls in the hot oil for 2-3 minutes, until golden brown. Drain on paper towels and sprinkle with salt.
Serve hot and enjoy!

doritos-pork-chops.name: Doritos Pork Chops

ingredients.item: Ranch-flavored tortilla chips (such as doritos® cool ranch®)
Nacho cheese-flavored corn chips (such as doritos®)
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).
Spread the crushed chips out in the bottom of a shallow dish.
Beat egg and milk together in a bowl; season with salt and pepper.
Pour melted butter in the bottom of a 9x13-inch casserole dish and tilt in all directions to spread evenly.
Dip pork chops in egg wash and set onto the crushed chips; cover both sides with chips, pressing them into the meat. Place breaded pork chops into the casserole dish.
Season tops of pork chops generously with garlic powder and onion powder.

Bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes. Flip pork chops over, season the other side with garlic powder and onion powder and cook until no longer pink in the center, an additional 10 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read 63°C (63 degrees C).

dorm-friendly-microwave-meals-for-a-day.name: Dorm-friendly Microwave Meals For A Day

ingredients.prep: plus more for garnish if desired

instructions: Make the Blueberry Ricotta Cake: In a large, microwave-safe mug, whisk together the ricotta cheese, maple syrup, melted butter, milk, and egg until smooth. Add the flour, baking powder, and salt and stir with a small rubber spatula to combine. Fold in the blueberries.
Cover the mug and microwave on high power for 3–4 minutes, until the batter is cooked through.

Make the streusel topping: In a small bowl, stir together the flour, brown sugar, and cinnamon. Add the butter and use your fingertips to pinch into the dry ingredients until evenly combined. Sprinkle the streusel over the mug cake.
Microwave uncovered for 60–90 seconds, until the topping is cooked through. Let the cake sit for 1 minute, then garnish with more blueberries and dust with powdered sugar, if desired, and serve.

Make the Chicken Quesadilla: Place the tortillas on a microwave-safe plate and microwave for 1 minute, until slightly crispy. Let cool while you microwave the chicken mixture; they will dry out a bit.
In a medium microwave-safe bowl, mix together the chicken, bell pepper, and taco seasoning until evenly combined. Microwave for 1–2 minutes, until the peppers have softened.

Spread the chicken mixture evenly on one tortilla, sprinkle evenly with the cheese, then top with the remaining tortilla. Microwave for 30–60 seconds, until the cheese is melted. Slice and serve immediately.
Make the Meal-Prep Lasagna: In a small bowl, mix together the ricotta, spinach, 1 tablespoon of Parmesan, the salt, and black pepper.

Spread a layer of marinara sauce on the bottom of a glass container. Arrange a layer of lasagna noodles on top. Cover the noodles with a layer of the ricotta mixture, then some of the mozzarella. Repeat to make more layers, topping the final layer of noodles with more marinara sauce, the remaining mozzarella, and the remaining tablespoon of Parmesan cheese.

Place the lid on top of the container, but do not seal it closed. Microwave for 7 minutes, or until the cheese is melted through. Remove from the microwave carefully, the container will be hot! Serve immediately, or let the lasagna cool and refrigerate for up to 5 days.

Make the Cheesecake: Melt the butter in a small microwaveable ramekin. Tilt the ramekin to coat the sides with the melted butter. Add the graham cracker crumbs to the ramekin with the melted butter and mix well. Use a spoon to press the crumbs evenly against the bottom of the dish.
In a small bowl, stir together the cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla until no lumps remain. Spread the filling on top of the graham cracker crust.

Microwave the cheesecake on half-power in 45-second increments for 4 minutes total, making sure the filling does not bubble over the sides of the ramekin. Remove the cheesecake from the microwave and chill in the freezer for at least 30 minutes, until completely cool to the touch.
With a knife, loosen the edges of the cheesecake, then invert onto a plate, or leave in the ramekin, and top with the raspberries before serving.
Enjoy!

doro-wat-ethiopian-chicken-dish.name: Doro Wat: Ethiopian Chicken Dish
instructions: Melt 1/2 cup butter in a skillet over medium-low heat. Add onion; cook and stir until translucent, 5 to 6 minutes. Add 1/2 cup water and tomato paste; stir until hot, about 2 minutes. Stir in berbere, remaining 1/2 cup butter, garlic, and ginger. Reduce heat to low; cook until mixture thickens to a paste consistency, 20 to 30 minutes.
Stir remaining 2 cups water into berbere paste; add chicken. Simmer until thickened to sauce consistency, about 45 minutes.
Stir wine, cardamom, and black pepper into sauce; add hard-cooked eggs. Cook until sauce is slightly reduced, about 15 minutes more.

dorothy-lynch-style-salad-dressing.name: Dorothy Lynch Style Salad Dressing
instructions: Mix tomato soup, vegetable oil, sugar, vinegar, dry mustard, salt, celery seeds, black pepper, and garlic powder in a large jar with a lid. For thicker dressing, stir in cornstarch. Serve immediately or refrigerate overnight for best flavor.

dosa-recipe-lezzet.name: Dosa Recipe

ingredients.item: 1/4 su bardağı urad dalı (beyaz hint mercimeği, kabuklu)
1/4 çay kaşığı maya (isteğe bağlı, mayalanmayı hızlandırmak için)
2 yemek kaşığı sıvı yağ (tavayı yağlamak için)
Beyaz pirinç yerine kahverengi pirinç, yasemin pirinci veya basmati pirinci kullanılabilir.
Daha hafif ve glutensiz bir versiyon için kinoa veya yulaf ezmesi karışımı tercih edilebilir.
Urad dalı bulamazsanız yeşil mercimek veya nohut kullanabilirsiniz.
Vejetaryen ve gluten içermeyen bir opsiyon için sadece pirinç ile de yapılabilir, kıvamı biraz daha farklı olur.
Sıvı yağ yerine zeytinyağı, hindistancevizi yağı veya ayçiçek yağı kullanabilirsiniz.
Daha hafif bir versiyon için tavayı sadece yağlı kağıt ile yağlayabilirsiniz.
Maya kullanmak istemiyorsanız, hamurun oda sıcaklığında uzun süre mayalanmasına izin vererek doğal fermantasyon sağlayabilirsiniz.
Daha hızlı bir yöntem için bir çay kaşığı karbonat ekleyebilirsiniz, fakat tat ve aroma hafif değişebilir.
Klasik sambar ve hindistancevizi sosu yerine yoğurt sosu, nane sosu veya baharatlı patates püresi ile sunabilirsiniz.
Dosa’yı iç harç ile dürüm şeklinde veya sade çıtır olarak servis edebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Pirinç ve urad dalını ayrı ayrı 4–6 saat suda bekletin.
2. Suyu süzün ve blender veya mutfak robotunda pürüzsüz bir hamur elde edecek şekilde çekin.
3. Pirinç ve urad dalı karışımını bir kapta birleştirin.
4. İsteğe bağlı olarak maya ekleyin ve tuzu katın.
5. Hamuru 8–12 saat veya bir gece boyunca oda sıcaklığında mayalanmaya bırakın.
6. Yapışmaz bir tava veya tawa ısıtın ve az miktarda yağ ile yağlayın.
7. Bir kepçe hamur dökün ve tavaya dairesel hareketlerle ince bir tabaka halinde yayın.
8. Orta ateşte 2–3 dakika pişirin.
9. Kenarları kıtır kıtır olduğunda spatula ile ters çevirmeden veya sadece altı kızarana kadar pişirin.
10. Sıcak olarak, patatesli masala, sambar veya hindistancevizi sosu ile servis edin.

double-and-by-double-i-mean-triple-choco.name: Double And By Double I Mean Triple Chocolate Cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast sunflower seeds on a rimmed baking sheet, stirring halfway through, until golden brown, about 5 minutes. Let cool.

Meanwhile, heat chopped bittersweet chocolate and white chocolate in a heatproof bowl set over a saucepan of barely simmering water (bowl should not touch water), stirring, until melted. Remove from heat and let sit, stirring occasionally, until cool, 10–15 minutes.

Finely grind sunflower seeds in spice mill. Transfer to a medium bowl and add flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, kosher salt, and baking soda; whisk to combine. Using an electric mixer on high speed, beat butter, granulated sugar, and brown sugar in a large bowl until very light and fluffy, about 5 minutes. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition before adding the next. Beat until mixture is very light and fluffy, about 2 minutes. Reduce speed to low and add melted chocolate mixture, followed by dry ingredients; beat just until combined. Mix in coconut and both chocolate chips with a rubber spatula.

Using a 2" cookie scoop or ¼-cup measuring cup, portion out dough onto parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing at least 2" apart (these are large cookies; you probably won’t fit more than 8 per sheet). Flatten cookies slightly with your palm and sprinkle with sea salt. Bake, rotating baking sheets halfway through, until cookies are just barely set around edges but still wet-looking in the center (they will seem underdone, but you don’t want to overbake), 15–20 minutes. Let cool on baking sheets 5 minutes, then transfer to wire racks and let cool completely.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 1 day ahead; cover and chill. Bring to room temperature before portioning. Cookies can be baked 2 days ahead; store airtight at room temperature.

double-banana-cake.name: Double Banana Cake

ingredients.item: (3 sticks) unsalted butter plus more for pans

ingredients.prep: such as Shamrock Farms® Heavy Whipping Cream

instructions: Preheat oven to 325°. Butter two 8"-diameter round cake pans with sides 2" high. Line bottoms of pans with parchment paper rounds. Whisk flour, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl. Using an electric mixer, beat 1½ cups butter and sugar in another large bowl until light and fluffy, 2–3 minutes. Add eggs one at a time, beating to blend between additions. With mixer on low, gradually beat in flour mixture, scraping sides of bowl. Mix in bananas, then sour cream. Divide batter between prepared pans.
Bake cakes until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 50–55 minutes. Let cool for 20 minutes in pans on wire racks.
Invert cakes onto wire racks; let cool completely. Remove parchment. Using a serrated knife, trim off rounded tops.
Using an electric mixer, beat first 5 ingredients in a large bowl until light and fluffy, 6–7 minutes.

Place 1 cake on a plate. Spread 1 cup frosting over. Arrange banana slices on top. Top with second cake. Spread a thin layer of frosting over top and sides of cake; chill for 30 minutes. Spread remaining frosting over top and sides of cakes.

double-cheeseburger.name: Double Cheeseburger
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium heat. Place hamburger bun halves, cut-sides down, in the hot skillet until lightly toasted, 2 to 3 minutes. Remove toasted buns to a plate.
Separate beef into 2 portions and form each into a thin patty slightly larger than bottom bun. Season each patty with salt.

Cook patties in the same large skillet over medium heat for 2 to 3 minutes. Flip patties over and place 2 cheese slices over each patty. Continue cooking until desired doneness is reached, 2 to 3 minutes more. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of patties should read 71°C (70 degrees C) for well done.
Assemble cheeseburger in the following order: bottom bun, dressing, tomato, lettuce, beef patty with cheese, onion, beef patty with cheese, and top bun.

double-cheeseburger-for-a-crowd.name: Double Cheeseburger For A Crowd
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C).
In a medium 8-inch (20-cm) cast-iron skillet, press down half of the ground beef with a spatula to mold into a patty. Season with salt and pepper.
Place the cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat and sear the patty until browned, about 4 minutes on each side.
Remove the patty from the skillet and set aside. Repeat with remaining beef.
Return the pan to low heat and add the onion. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the onion is caramelized, about 20 minutes.
Add the garlic and spinach, stirring until the spinach is cooked down, about 5 minutes.
Lay one sheet of puff pastry on a baking sheet and top with 1 patty.
Layer 4 slices of cheese over the patty, then top with the caramelized onion mixture.
Top with the remaining 4 slices of cheese and the other patty.
Cover with the other sheet of puff pastry.
Trim the edges of the pastry with a knife and discard.
Crimp the edges of the pastry, then press with a fork to seal.
Brush the top and sides of the pastry with the beaten egg and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Bake for 30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and cooked through.
Slice and serve with additional toppings of your choice.
Enjoy!

double-chicken-tea.name: Double Chicken Tea
instructions: Slice breast meat off chickens by cutting along either side of each breastbone, across the ribcage, and down to the wing joints. Cut off meat and save for another meal, reserving skin for chicken tea.

Transfer whole chickens and skin from breasts into 1 extra large or 2 standard (5 1/2- to 6-quart) pots. Divide carrots, celery, and onions between the pots, followed by garlic, bay leaves, and peppercorns. Fill each pot to the top with cold water.

Place the pots over medium-high heat and bring to a boil, watching carefully. Immediately reduce heat to low. Skim off any foam from the tops with a spoon. Adjust heat to maintain a very gentle simmer where only small bubbles poke up through the surface. Continue to simmer for 8 to 12 hours.

Use a slotted spoon to transfer the solids into a strainer set over a large bowl; discard chunks and pour strained broth back into a pot. Combine all the liquid into one pot. Strain broth again through a fine-mesh strainer into whichever pot was emptied.
Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, skimming fat from the top; boil until reduced by half. Turn off heat and season with salt, tasting and adjusting as needed.
Strain broth through a cheesecloth or nut milk bag into a container. Serve steaming hot in a pot as you would tea, or let cool and refrigerate until ready to serve.

double-chocolate-box-brownies.name: Double Chocolate 'box' Brownies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (180°C). Line a 9-inch (23 cm) square pan with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, milk, oil, and egg.
Add ½ cup (115 g) chopped dark chocolate and the chopped white chocolate and mix until combined.
Spread the brownie batter in the prepared pan.
Sprinkle the remaining chopped dark chocolate on top.
Bake for 30 minutes until toothpick comes out clean when inserted in the middle.
Let cool before slicing and serve.
Enjoy!

double-chocolate-and-peppermint-ice-crea.name: Double Chocolate And Peppermint Ice Cream Sandwich Cookies

ingredients.item: Reynolds kitchens™ quick cut™ plastic wrap

instructions: COMBINE flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt in a medium bowl; set aside.

BEAT butter and both sugars on medium-high speed in a large bowl until light and fluffy, about 3 minutes. BEAT in the egg. Gradually ADD the flour mixture on low speed until completely blended. STIR in chopped chocolate.

DIVIDE dough in half. SHAPE each half into a 1 1/2-x 8-inch log. WRAP each log in Reynolds Kitchens Quick Cut Plastic Wrap. REFRIGERATE at least one hour until logs are chilled and firm enough to slice.

PREHEAT oven to 177°C. Line cookie sheets with Reynolds Kitchens Parchment Paper. SLICE cookie logs into 1/4-inch rounds. PLACE rounds 2 inches apart on lined cookie sheets, gently reshaping edges if necessary.
BAKE until edges are set, 13 to 14 minutes. Cool for 2 minutes on a cooling rack. Carefully slide parchment paper with cookies onto a cooling rack; cool cookies completely on parchment paper.

MAKE sandwiches using your favorite pint of ice cream. Using a large knife, CUT directly through the ice cream to make clean slices. Place an ice cream round onto cookie. ROLL edges in coarsely crushed candies to decorate.

PLACE in a single layer in an airtight container lined with Reynolds Kitchens parchment paper. FREEZE immediately until ice cream is firm. Separate layers of cookies with sheets of parchment paper. Keep frozen until ready to serve.

double-chocolate-banana-monkey-bread.name: Double Chocolate Banana Monkey Bread

ingredients.item: Refrigerated buttermilk biscuit dough (such as pillsbury grands!®)

instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray a 9-inch cake pan with cooking spray.
Combine brown sugar, half of the pudding mix, and cinnamon in a large resealable plastic bag. Seal and shake well until thoroughly combined and no lumps remain.
Pour the remaining half of the pudding mix and 1/2 cup melted butter into a small bowl. Stir until combined.

Dip each biscuit piece in the butter mixture and shake in the sugar mixture. Arrange half of the pieces into a layer on the bottom the prepared pan. Drop banana over the layer; sprinkle chocolate chips on top. Cover with a layer of of the remaining biscuit pieces.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown and no longer doughy in the center, 18 to 22 minutes. Cool monkey bread in the pan for 10 minutes. Invert onto a serving plate.
Beat confectioners' sugar, 2 tablespoons butter, and cream in a bowl until smooth. Drizzle over monkey bread.

double-chocolate-brownie-cake.name: Double Chocolate Brownie Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour a 10-inch Bundt pan. Have all ingredients at room temperature.

Stir cake mix and pudding mix together in a large bowl. Make a well in the center and pour in eggs, sour cream, oil, and water. Beat on low speed until blended. Scrape bowl, and beat 4 minutes on medium speed. Stir in chocolate chips. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean, about 50 to 60 minutes. Allow to cool.

double-chocolate-chip-cookies-recipe-lez.name: Double Chocolate Chip Cookies Recipe

ingredients.item: Yarım su bardağı tuzsuz tereyağı (oda sıcaklığında)
Kahverengi ve toz şeker yerine hindistancevizi şekeri, akçaağaç şurubu, agave şurubu veya stevia kullanılabilir.
Daha hafif bir seçenek için eritritol veya monk fruit tatlandırıcı tercih edilebilir.
Beyaz un yerine tam buğday unu, yulaf unu, badem unu veya glutensiz un karışımları kullanılabilir.
Daha nemli bir doku için badem veya hindistancevizi unu ekleyebilirsiniz.
Kakao yerine raw kakao veya aromalı kakao kullanabilirsiniz.
çikolata parçaları yerine bitter, sütlü veya beyaz çikolata, vegan çikolata veya şekersiz çikolata tercih edilebilir.
Daha fazla aroma için fındık, ceviz, kaju veya damla çikolata ekleyebilirsiniz.
Vegan veya alerji durumları için chia veya keten tohumu jeli kullanılabilir (1 yumurta ≈ 1 yemek kaşığı chia/keten tohumu + 3 yemek kaşığı su, 10 dakika bekletilmiş).
üzeri için damla çikolata yerine rendelenmiş çikolata, kakao, kuruyemiş veya renkli drajeler kullanılabilir.
Biraz tuzlu aroma için deniz tuzu yerine fıstık veya tuzlu karamelli parçalar ekleyebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Tereyağı, kahverengi şeker ve toz şekeri mikserle yaklaşık 2 dakika çırparak krema kıvamına getirin.
2.  Ardından yumurtayı ve vanilya özütünü ekleyip iyice karıştırın.
3.  Başka bir kapta un, kakao tozu, karbonat ve tuzu bir araya getirip karıştırın.
4.  Bu kuru karışımı, çikolata parçalarıyla birlikte tereyağlı karışıma ekleyin ve düşük hızda karıştırarak homojen bir hamur elde edin.
5.  Hamurdan 2 yemek kaşığı büyüklüğünde parçalar alarak aralıklı şekilde fırın tepsisine yerleştirin.
6.  Üzerlerine damla çikolata parçaları serpin, isterseniz biraz da deniz tuzu ekleyebilirsiniz.
7.  Önceden ısıtılmış 175 derecelik fırında 9-10 dakika pişirin; kurabiyelerin kenarları hafif sertleşmeli, ortası ise yumuşak kalmalıdır.
8.  Fırından çıkardıktan sonra 5 dakika tepside soğumasını bekleyin, ardından tel ızgaraya alıp tamamen soğutun ve servis yapın.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

double-chocolate-chunk-walnut-cookies.name: Double Chocolate Chunk Walnut Cookies

ingredients.item: (65 grams) white whole wheat unbleached flour

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C. Line 2 regular baking sheets with silicone baking mats (such as Silpats) or lightly spray nonstick baking sheets with oil.
In a large bowl, using an electric hand mixer, whisk together the sugars, avocado, applesauce, egg white, and vanilla until the sugar dissolves, about 2 to 3 minutes.

In a separate large bowl, whisk together the flours, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt. Fold in the dry ingredients with a spatula in two additions. Using a spatula, fold in the chocolate chunks and walnuts. The dough will be very sticky. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate 15 minutes.
Drop the dough by tablespoonfuls about 1 inch apart onto the prepared baking sheets and smooth the tops.
Bake until almost set, 10 to 12 minutes. Let cool for 5 minutes on the pan, then transfer to wire racks to cool completely.

double-chocolate-cookies.name: Double Chocolate Cookies
instructions:
Your 2 large eggs need to be at room temperature for this recipe. If they aren’t, put them in a small bowl and cover them with hot tap water. This’ll bring them up to speed quickly.
→  Here's our guide for bringing eggs, butter, and dairy to room temp.

Coarsely chop four 2-oz. chocolate bars. You want them to be bigger than normal chocolate chips (aim for 3–4 times the size)—this creates the chocolate puddles. Set aside. Chop remaining 2-oz. chocolate bar into 20-ish pieces (you’re going to place one or two pieces atop each cookie).

Cut 2 sticks unsalted butter into large pieces. Cook in a medium saucepan over medium-low heat, stirring often, until it foams, then browns, 7–9 minutes. (Watch carefully since browned butter goes from brown to black in the blink of an eye.) Immediately scrape into a large bowl and let cool slightly, about 5 minutes.

While butter cools, whisk 1⅔ cups all-purpose flour and 1 tsp. baking soda in a medium bowl to combine. Press ⅓ cup cocoa powder through a fine-mesh sieve into bowl (this eliminates those pesky lumps), then whisk again to combine.

Add ¾ cup brown sugar, ¼ cup granulated sugar, and 1½ tsp. kosher salt to browned butter. Using a wooden spoon or rubber spatula, stir vigorously to combine. Add 1 large egg and whisk vigorously until incorporated, about 1 minute. Repeat with remaining 1 large egg, then whisk in 1 Tbsp. vanilla paste.

Switch back to your spatula or spoon to stir in dry ingredients just to combine. Mix in the 4 chopped chocolate bars you set aside. Let dough sit at room temperature at least 1 hour to let flour and cocoa hydrate. The dough will thicken as it sits.

Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 375°. Line 2 baking sheets with parchment paper. Shape dough into ping-pong sized balls (about 3 Tbsp.). Arrange on prepared baking sheets, spacing about 3" apart. Lightly press a chunk or two of remaining chocolate on top of each dough ball.

Bake cookies, rotating pans top to bottom and front to back halfway through, until edges are just set but centers are still soft, 8–10 minutes. Remove from oven and carefully tap pan on stovetop to deflate and flatten cookies. Let cool on baking sheets 10 minutes, then transfer to a wire rack and let cool completely.
Transfer cookies to a platter. Serve and enjoy!
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 3 days ahead; cover and chill. Let dough come to room temperature before baking.

double-chocolate-fudge-pops.name: Double Chocolate Fudge Pops
instructions: Combine sugar, cornstarch, cocoa powder, and milk in a small saucepan over medium heat. Bring to a simmer and stir until thick, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat; stir in vanilla and butter.
Transfer to a heatproof bowl and refrigerate until cool, approximately 20 minutes.
Stir chocolate chips into the cooled chocolate mixture.
Pour into your favorite popsicle molds and freeze until solid, about 4 hours.
To serve, run warm water over the molds until fudge pops slide out easily.

double-chocolate-mocha-trifle.name: Double Chocolate Mocha Trifle
instructions: Prepare brownies according to package directions. Bake and cool completely. Cut into 1 inch cubes.
In a medium bowl, whisk together milk and pudding mix until mixture begins to thicken. Dissolve coffee granules in water and stir into pudding mixture. Fold in whipped topping.

In a glass serving bowl, layer one-third of brownie cubes, one-third of pudding mixture and one-third of candy. Repeat layering until all ingredients are used. Chill 30 minutes in refrigerator before serving.

double-chocolate-tart-with-black-pepper-.name: Double Chocolate Tart With Black Pepper Ice Cream

ingredients.item: Chocolate wafer cookies (such as nabisco famous chocolate wafers; about 28 cookies)

instructions: Bring cream, milk, 1/2 cup sugar, and salt to a boil in a large heavy saucepan over medium heat, stirring to dissolve sugar; remove from heat. Whisk egg yolks and remaining 1/2 cup sugar in a large bowl to blend; gradually whisk in hot milk mixture and return to saucepan. Stir over low heat until custard thickens and your finger leaves a path on the back of a spoon when drawn across, about 6 minutes. Pour through a fine-mesh strainer into a medium bowl. Stir in pepper. Set bowl over a large bowl of ice water; stir until cold.
Process custard in an ice cream maker according to manufacturer's instructions. Transfer to a container, cover, and freeze. DO AHEAD Can be made 3 days ahead.

Preheat oven to 250°. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Whisk sugar, egg white, and salt in a medium bowl just until bubbles form. Stir in hazelnuts. Spread out on prepared sheet. Bake, stirring every 10 minutes, until nuts are golden brown and caramelized, about 50 minutes. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

Preheat oven to 325°. Coat tart pan with nonstick spray. Finely grind cookies in a food processor. Drizzle butter over; pulse until blended. Press evenly onto bottom and up sides of pan. Bake until firm, about 15 minutes. Let cool completely.

Place chocolate in a medium bowl. Bring cream to a boil in a small saucepan. Pour over chocolate; stir until melted. Pour filling over cooled crust. Freeze until firm, at least 2 hours and up to 2 days.

Remove the tart pan side. Cut tart into wedges, working quickly as tart will become gooey as it sits; place 1 piece on each plate. Serve with a scoop of black pepper ice cream and garnish with candied hazelnuts.

double-chocolate-candy-cane-kiss-cookies.name: Double Chocolate-candy Cane Kiss Cookies

ingredients.item: White chocolate kisses with candy cane stripes

instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line 2 baking sheets with parchment paper.

Beat butter in a large bowl with an electric mixer for 30 seconds. Add sugar, brown sugar, and baking soda; beat until well mixed. Mix in eggs, melted chocolate, and vanilla extract. Gradually beat in flour and cocoa powder until well combined.
Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough 2 inches apart onto the prepared baking sheets.

Bake in the preheated oven until edges begin to firm up, about 7 minutes. Remove from the oven and add 1 white chocolate kiss to the center of each cookie, pressing down just slightly. Return to the oven and bake for approximately 1 minute. Cool on the baking sheets for 1 minute before removing to a wire rack to cool completely.

double-chocolate-peppermint-crunch-cooki.name: Double Chocolate-peppermint Crunch Cookies

ingredients.item: Bittersweet chocolate chips (do not exceed 61% cacao; 15 to 16 ounces)
Candy canes or 16 red-and-white-striped hard peppermint candies

instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C. Line 2 large rimmed baking sheets with parchment paper. Stir 2 cups chocolate chips in medium metal bowl set over saucepan of simmering water until melted and smooth. Measure 2/3 cup melted chocolate; transfer to small metal bowl and reserve for drizzling.

Whisk flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, espresso powder, and salt in medium bowl. Using electric mixer, beat butter in large bowl until creamy. Add sugar and both extracts; beat until smooth. Add eggs; beat to blend. Beat in melted chocolate from medium bowl. Add dry ingredients; beat just to blend. Stir in remaining 1/2 cup chocolate chips. Measure 1 level tablespoonful dough; roll dough between palms to form ball. Place on prepared baking sheet. Repeat with remaining dough, spacing cookies 11/2 inches apart.

Bake cookies until cracked all over and tester inserted into center comes out with large moist crumbs attached, 8 to 9 minutes. Cool cookies on baking sheet 5 minutes. Transfer cookies on parchment paper to racks to cool completely.
